title: xerochrysum subundulatum
intro: Xerochrysum subundulatum, also known as golden everlasting or paper daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xerochrysum subundulatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in capsule or tablet form to harness its medicinal properties.
